---
title: "Customer Segmentation Using Clustering"
image: "https://placehold.co/600x400?text=Customer+Segmentation"
categories: [Segmentation, Machine Learning, Customer Insights]
index: 3
---

#### **Overview**  
Applied clustering techniques to segment customers based on behavior and preferences, enabling targeted marketing strategies and improved personalization.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Learning Outcomes**  
- Collected and cleaned survey data using Qualtrics  
- Applied clustering techniques to segment customers  
- Conducted regression and statistical analysis  
- Evaluated factors influencing customer satisfaction  
- Analyzed behavioral and preference patterns  
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Key Skills Gained**  
- Identified distinct customer segments with different needs  
- Found price, food quality, and cleanliness as key drivers  
- Revealed differences between price-sensitive and experience-focused users  
- Enabled targeted marketing and service improvements  
- Supported data-driven decision-making for operations  

:::
:::
